JustinNews.tech - AI-Powered Technology News Aggregator

ABOUT
JustinNews.tech is a cutting-edge news aggregation platform that combines real-time RSS feed parsing with AI-powered insights. We aggregate technology news from 25+ premium sources including TechCrunch, The Verge, NY Times, Wired, and more across 8 categories: Global News, Technology & Innovation, Business & Finance, Sports, Entertainment, Education & Learning, Social Media Trends, and Random Discoveries.

MISSION
Our mission is to democratize access to high-quality technology news by aggregating diverse sources, filtering information by user preferences, and providing AI-powered analysis through our intelligent chatbot assistant.

CORE FEATURES
- Real-Time News Aggregation: Automatic RSS feed parsing from 25+ premium sources
- Advanced Search & Filtering: Full-text search across titles, descriptions, and sources with category and date filtering
- User-Generated Content: Platform for publishing your own articles that appear in the main feed
- Article Bookmarking: Save and organize articles for later reading
- AI Chat Assistant: Groq-powered chatbot for discussing news, getting summaries, and recommendations
- Newsletter Subscription: Customize daily, weekly, or monthly news digests by topic
- Analytics Dashboard: Track your reading habits and engagement metrics
- Dark/Light Mode: Theme customization for comfortable reading
- Mobile Optimized: Full responsive design for all devices

SITE SECTIONS
1. Home (/) - Main feed with all aggregated articles
2. Articles (/article/[id]) - Internal article reader with metadata and sharing
3. Saved (/saved) - Personal article bookmarks
4. Trending (/trending) - 24 most recent articles
5. Search (/search) - Advanced search with filters
6. Publish (/publish) - User article publishing
7. Newsletter (/newsletter) - Email digest signup
8. Settings (/settings) - Preferences and analytics
9. Support (/support) - Help and contact information
10. Admin (/admin) - RSS feed management

TECHNOLOGY STACK
- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Next.js API Routes, Groq AI (Llama 3.3 70B)
- Storage: localStorage with database-ready architecture
- Design: Professional light theme with serif typography (Playfair Display)

CONTENT CATEGORIES
- Global News: International coverage and world events
- Technology & Innovation: Latest tech developments, gadgets, AI, cybersecurity
- Business & Finance: Startup news, investments, market updates
- Sports: Sports coverage and updates
- Entertainment: Entertainment and pop culture news
- Education & Learning: Educational resources and learning platforms
- Social Media Trends: Viral content and social media updates
- Random Discoveries: Curated interesting articles

DATA & PRIVACY
All user data is stored locally in browser localStorage. No data is sent to external servers except for:
- Newsletter subscriptions (email validated on server)
- AI chat requests (through Groq API)
- RSS feed parsing (standard web requests)

SUPPORT CONTACT

Website: https://justinnews.tech
Support Page: https://justinnews.tech/support

CHANGELOG
- Added YourStory.com-inspired professional design overhaul
- Implemented Playfair Display serif fonts for editorial credibility
- Enhanced chatbot to answer questions about all site features
- Integrated analytics tracking system
- Added user article publishing with main feed integration
- Implemented settings-aware share buttons and theme preferences
- Added internal article reader with analytics
- Deployed complete responsive mobile design

FUTURE ROADMAP
- Database backend integration (Supabase/PostgreSQL)
- Real email sending for newsletters
- User authentication and cross-device sync
- Content moderation system for published articles
- Advanced analytics with detailed insights
- Social media integration
- API for third-party integrations
- Dark mode refinement

For more information about specific features, visit https://justinnews.tech or contact support.
